creator: ohartmann@walstatt.org
text:
Building port on recent CURRENT using portmaster fails with error below. Port tree is up to date, port portmaster is up top date, OS is at
FreeBSD 15.0-CURRENT #0 main-n269169-0192eda105b3: Sun Apr  7 02:08:57 CEST 2024 amd64.

[...]
===>  Building for e2fsprogs-libuuid-1.47.0
/bin/mkdir -p /usr/ports/misc/e2fsprogs-libuuid/work/e2fsprogs-1.47.0/lib/uuid/elfshared
cd /usr/ports/misc/e2fsprogs-libuuid/work/e2fsprogs-1.47.0/util && gmake subst
: invalid option -- D
